```{r}
chaine <- "Bonjour Tous Le Monde"
nchar(chaine)
```

```{r}
texte <- "AymenRami"
substr(texte, 1, 6)
```
```{r}
nom <- "Aymen"
age <- 21
paste(nom, age)
```

```{r}
texte <- "Hello"
toupper(texte)
```

```{r}
texte <- "HELLO"
tolower(texte)
```
```{r}
nom <- "Aymen"
age <- 21
paste0(nom , age)
```
```{r}
phrase <- "Bonjour à tous"
strsplit(phrase, " ")
```
```{r}
chaine <- "excellent"
gsub("e", "E", chaine)
```

```{r}
chaine <- c("chat", "chien", "oiseau")
grep("ch", chaine)
```
```{r}
chaine <- "excellent"
sub("e", "E", chaine)
```
```{r}
nom <- "Alice"; age <- 25
sprintf("Nom: %s, Age: %d", nom, age)
```
